zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wollacomb II於大約1530年出生在英國英格蘭戴文阿黑林頓時，他的父親Alexander Wollacombe esq18歲，母親Anne Pollard15歲。他於1557年6月8日與Mary Bassett在英國戴文阿黑林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1590年在英國享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wollacomb II于大约1530年出生在英国英格兰戴文阿黑林頓时，他的父亲Alexander Wollacombe esq18岁，母亲Anne Pollard15岁。他于1557年6月8日与Mary Bassett在英国戴文阿黑林頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1590年在英国享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When John Wollacomb II was born about 1530, in Atherington, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Alexander Wollacombe esq, was 18 and his mother, Anne Pollard, was 15. He married Mary Bassett on 8 June 1557, in Atherington, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1590, in England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wollacomb II est né environ 1530, à Atherington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Wollacombe esq, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Anne Pollard, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Mary Bassett le 8 juin 1557, à Atherington, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1590, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wollacomb II um 1530 in Atherington, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Wollacombe esq 18 und seine Mutter Anne Pollard 15. Er hat am 8. Juni 1557 in Atherington, Devon, England Mary Bassett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1590 im Alter von 61 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wollacomb II è nato il circa 1530 nel Atherington, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Alexander Wollacombe esq, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Anne Pollard, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Mary Bassett il 8 giugno 1557, nel Atherington, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1590, nel England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wollacomb IIが約1530年にイギリスイギリスデボンアスエリントンで生まれた時，父Alexander Wollacombe esqは18歳，母Anne Pollardは15歳であった。1557年6月8日にイギリスデボンアスエリントンでMary Bassettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1590年にイギリスで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wollacomb II(이)가 대략 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 앳헤링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Wollacombe esq(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Pollard(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1557년 6월 8일 영국 데폰 앳헤링턴에서 Mary Bassett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1590년 영국에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wollacomb II nasceu aproximadamente 1530, em Atherington, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Wollacombe esq, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Anne Pollard, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Bassett em 8 de junho de 1557, em Atherington, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1590, em Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wollacomb II родился около 1530 г. в местности атирингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexander Wollacombe esq было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Pollard, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Bassett 8 июня 1557 г. в местности атирингтон, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1590 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wollacomb II nació aproximadamente 1530, en Atherington, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Alexander Wollacombe esq, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Anne Pollard, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Mary Bassett el 8 de junio de 1557, en Atherington, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1590, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
